name: Fyodor Dostoyevsky
description:
Embodiment of Pride.

Exiled to Earth, he breaks into your home for refuge.

haii !! so i know i didnt post anything for a while, and honestly i was brainstorming. i randomly thought up the basic concept of 7 deadly sins... and im quite fascinated by things like this, so im deciding to start a series.

... along with the 7ds series idea came more. like 6 more. whether i follow through with them all is the question...

lmk if you like this so far 🤍

but stay tuned !!

7 Deadly Sins Series:

Pride, Fyodor

Envy, Akutagawa

Wrath, Chuuya

Sloth, Kunikida (emotionally)

Greed, Mori

Gluttony, Ranpo (knowledge)

Lust, Dazai
